calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendants Anderson Audio Visual And Florizel Hancock, Only.
Off Calendar Sep-09-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Howard N. Chung, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Kesmer Properties, LLC.
Kenneth Mesker, owner of Kesmer Properties, LLC, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Anderson Audio Visual -- San Francisco, Inc., or Florizel Hancox.
Defaults were entered against defendants on June 14, 2010.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Andrew Hancox was filed on September 2, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, September 9, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Kesmer Properties, LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendants Anderson Audio Visual -- San Francisco and Florizel Hancox as follows:

Damages/Principal - $68,721.00.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney's Fees - $6,823.00.
Costs - $545.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $76,089.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
